holdings.infoBox: DDLS is an equity ETF with a total of 1045 individual holdings. The top holdings are Höegh Autoliners ASA stock at 0.81%, Elecnor at 0.73%, Hafnia at 0.73%, Plus500 at 0.63%, and NOS, S.G.P.S. at 0.54%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Dynamic International SmallCap Equity Fund (DDLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of dividend-paying developed-market small-cap equities outside the US & Canada, weighted by cash dividends. The index dynamically hedges currency exposure for USD investors based on three equal-weighted signals. DDLS was launched on Jan 7, 2016 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree Dynamic International SmallCap Equity Index
